assertions.title: Reportes page loads correctly after Alert import fix

steps.observed: Login form displayed with email/password fields

steps.action: Wait 8 seconds for page to fully load
steps.observed: Full content rendered including Citas administrativas table with data

steps.action: Check page content and console errors
steps.expected: No errors, page shows proper content
steps.observed: Page shows 'Reportes y operaciones' heading, alert with session info 'Sesión: admin@simut.test (admin)', citas table with data, and series section. No console errors.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. The /admin/reportes page loads correctly after the Alert import fix. The page renders 'Reportes y operaciones' heading, session info alert, citas administrativas table with real data, and series de reserva administrativa section. No console errors detected.
